business.name: Mustang Service Center

seo.title: Mustang Service Center | Expert Mustang Repair in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Trust Mustang Service Center in Dallas, TX for expert Mustang repair and maintenance. Certified technicians, fast turnaround, and affordable pricing. Call (214) 824-6716 today!

hero.headline: Expert Mustang Repair & Maintenance
hero.subheadline: From classic models to modern performance, we keep your Mustang running at its best.

featureSections.title: Specialized Mustang Service
featureSections.body: We understand Mustangs inside and out. Our team uses factory-grade tools and diagnostics to ensure your vehicle gets the care it deserves.
featureSections.cardBody: Most repairs completed within hours, not days.

featureSections.title: No Surprises, Just Quality
featureSections.body: We provide detailed estimates upfront and keep you informed throughout the repair process. No hidden fees, no unnecessary work.
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

whyChooseUs.title: Mustang-Only Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We work exclusively on Mustangs, so we know every model and common issue inside out.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training on the latest Mustang technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Competitive Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: Get top-quality service at fair prices. We offer estimates before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Dallas Location
whyChooseUs.description: Easily accessible in Dallas with flexible scheduling and quick turnaround times.

testimonials.quote: They fixed my 2015 GT's transmission issue quickly and at a fair price. I won't take my Mustang anywhere else.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: Knowledgeable and honest. They diagnosed a problem that another shop missed entirely.
testimonials.author: Jessica T.

testimonials.quote: Fast service on my classic '65. They treated it like their own car.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Mustang Back on the Road?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online for fast, reliable service.

servicesPage.intro: At Mustang Service Center, we offer comprehensive repair and maintenance for all Mustang generations. From routine oil changes to major engine overhauls, our certified technicians have you covered.

services.title: Engine Repair & Diagnostics
services.shortDescription: Expert engine diagnostics and repair for all Mustang models.
services.longDescription: Our technicians use advanced diagnostic equipment to pinpoint engine issues quickly. Whether it's a misfire, loss of power, or check engine light, we'll get your Mustang running smoothly again.
benefits: Accurate diagnostics save time and money

process.title: Diagnostic Scan
process.description: We connect to your Mustang's computer to read codes and live data.

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: We perform a thorough inspection and provide a detailed estimate.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: Once approved, we complete the repair and test drive to ensure quality.

faqs.question: How much does an engine diagnostic cost?
faqs.answer: Our diagnostic fee is $89, which is waived if you proceed with the repair.

faqs.question: Do you work on Coyote engines?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience with Coyote and other modern Mustang engines.

services.title: Transmission Service
services.shortDescription: Manual and automatic transmission repair and maintenance.
services.longDescription: From fluid changes to full rebuilds, we handle all transmission needs for Mustangs. Our technicians are trained on both automatic and manual transmissions, including the latest 10-speed automatics.

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We inspect fluid level, color, and smell for signs of wear.

process.title: Road Test
process.description: We test drive to identify shifting issues or noises.

process.title: Service or Repair
process.description: We perform the necessary service, from fluid flush to full rebuild.

faqs.question: How often should I change transmission fluid?
faqs.answer: We recommend every 30,000 miles for severe use, or 60,000 miles for normal driving.

faqs.question: Do you rebuild 10R80 transmissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have the tools and expertise to rebuild the 10-speed automatic.

services.title: Brake & Suspension
services.shortDescription: Brake pads, rotors, shocks, and suspension upgrades.
services.longDescription: Keep your Mustang stopping and handling at its best. We offer brake inspections, pad and rotor replacements, as well as suspension upgrades for better performance and comfort.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, and suspension components.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide options for OEM or performance parts based on your needs.

process.title: Installation & Test
process.description: We install parts and test drive to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade to performance brakes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can install slotted rotors, performance pads, and stainless lines.

faqs.question: How long does a brake job take?
faqs.answer: Most brake jobs are completed in 2-3 hours.

services.title: Electrical & AC Service
services.shortDescription: Diagnostics and repair for electrical systems and air conditioning.
services.longDescription: From battery replacements to complex wiring issues, we handle all electrical and AC needs. Our team uses factory wiring diagrams and diagnostic tools to solve problems efficiently.

process.title: System Scan
process.description: We check battery, alternator, starter, and scan for fault codes.

process.title: AC Performance Test
process.description: We measure pressure and temperature to diagnose AC issues.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We repair or replace components and verify system operation.

faqs.question: My Mustang's AC blows warm air. What's wrong?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a bad compressor, or a leak. We can diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: Do you fix aftermarket stereo issues?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can troubleshoot and repair electrical problems from aftermarket installations.

about.headline: Dallas' Trusted Mustang Specialists Since 1998
about.mission: To provide expert, honest, and affordable Mustang repair and maintenance to the Dallas community.
story: Mustang Service Center was founded in 1998 by lifelong Mustang enthusiast John M. with a simple mission: offer specialized, high-quality service for Mustangs at a fair price. What started as a two-bay shop has grown into a full-service facility serving thousands of Mustang owners across Dallas.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of certified technicians who share a passion for the Mustang brand. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training to ensure every Mustang that leaves our shop is safe, reliable, and performing at its best. We treat every car as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: We focus exclusively on Mustangs, so we know them better than anyone.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We provide transparent estimates and never recommend unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use OEM or better parts and stand behind our work with a warranty.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local Mustang clubs and events, and treat our customers like family.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form to schedule your appointment.
